final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover
Asset type: short video vertical cover, 9:16
Primary request: bold headline "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" with high visual impact
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient or solid dark background with subtle tech texture
Subject: large typography as hero element, minimal tech product silhouette optional
Style/medium: minimalist graphic design, premium tech aesthetic
Composition/framing: rule of thirds layout, headline placed at upper third intersection
Lighting/mood: soft ambient glow, sophisticated and premium
Color palette: deep charcoal or black base + electric blue or silver accent + high contrast white text
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: large headline must dominate frame, maintain minimal aesthetic, text must be highly legible
Avoid: cluttered elements, multiple fonts, decorative ornaments, watermark
